description: Composition Red kurta made of a 100% cotton fabric, has three-quarter sleeves, mandarin collar with a slit neckline, pintucks on the shoulder, floral print and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only This kurta by diva  is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5’9”, chest 33” and shoulders 15.5”
